name: Dental
description: Dental care focused on the health, function, and appearance of teeth, gums, and jaw support.

name: Eye Care
description: Care for vision and eye health, including the lens, cornea, and other important parts of the eye.

name: Hair Restoration
description: Care focused on restoring hair growth, hair density, and a natural-looking hairline.

name: Dermatology
description: Care focused on skin health, visible skin concerns, and non-surgical aesthetic skin treatments.

name: Plastic Surgery
description: Surgical care that reshapes or refines facial and body features.

name: Dental Implants
description: A dental field that replaces missing teeth with fixed implant-supported restorations.

name: Orthodontics
description: A dental field that aligns teeth and bite using braces or clear aligner systems.

name: Cosmetic Dentistry
description: Dental care focused on improving the visible appearance of teeth and smile.

name: Restorative Dentistry
description: Dental care that repairs damaged or missing tooth structure to restore normal chewing function.

name: Lens Surgery
description: Eye surgery involving the natural lens or an artificial lens placed inside the eye.

name: Laser Vision Correction
description: Eye procedures that reshape the cornea with laser technology to reduce refractive error.

name: Cataract Surgery
description: Eye surgery that removes a cloudy lens and replaces it with a clear artificial lens.

name: Cornea
description: Eye care focused on the cornea, the clear front surface that helps focus vision.

name: Scalp Hair Transplant
description: Hair transplant procedures that move healthy follicles to thinning or bald areas on the scalp.

name: Facial Hair Transplant
description: Hair transplant procedures for the beard, mustache, eyebrows, and other facial hair areas.

name: Hair Loss Therapy
description: Non-surgical care for hair thinning and hair loss, including regenerative and injection-based treatments.

name: Skin Conditions
description: Care for common skin concerns that affect the look, comfort, or health of the skin.

name: Laser Dermatology
description: Laser-based skin care for concerns such as texture, tone, pigmentation, and unwanted hair.

name: Injectables
description: Non-surgical aesthetic treatments that are placed into the skin or tissue by injection.

name: Facial Surgery
description: Plastic surgery focused on changing the shape or structure of facial features.

name: Breast Surgery
description: Plastic surgery focused on changing breast size, shape, and position.

name: Body Contouring
description: Plastic surgery procedures that reshape body contours by removing fat or tightening tissue.
